ojs

t_infodolar = transpose(infodolar)
viewof selectedEntidad = Inputs
  .select([...new Set(t_infodolar.map(d => d.entidad))], { label: "Select Entidad" })
to_plot = t_infodolar
  .filter(d => d.entidad === selectedEntidad)

Plot.plot({
  y: { domain: [59, 63], grid: true },
  color: {legend: true},
  x: {type: 'time'},
  marks: [
    Plot.ruleY([59]),
    Plot.lineY(
      to_plot, 
      {
        x: "date", 
        y: "tasa", 
        stroke: "type",
      }),
    Plot.tip(to_plot, Plot.pointer({
      x: "date",
      y: "tasa",
      title: (d) => `${d.type}: ${d.tasa}`
    }))
  ]
})
current_data = t_infodolar.filter(d => d.date === "2025-03-10")

Plot.plot({
  grid: true,
  marks: [
    Plot.rectY(current_data, Plot.binX({y: "count"}, {x: "tasa", fill: "type", fy: "type"})),
    Plot.ruleY([0])
  ]
})
